name: Meta
philosophy: Meta's design system spans hardware commerce (Quest VR, Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses) and brand surfaces with a confident product-merchandising voice.
trademark_signals: Stark white canvas  carrying full-bleed product photography with (32px) corner softening on showcase tiles
Two-tier primary button system: marketing CTAs use pills; commerce CTAs use cobalt pills inside buy-now panels
Optimistic VF as the universal display + body face with consistent ss01, ss02 OpenType features
Pill-shaped buttons  and / cards as the dominant geometric signature
Saturated promotional banners (yellow , dark ) used sparingly above the nav for time-bound offers
ai_slop_avoided: introduce additional accent colors beyond cobalt + Oculus purple. The hardware brand is deliberately monochromatic outside its product photography
soften the corners of pill buttons below. The pill is a brand signature
